tasks.title: Fix Peach Plumbing website button — upper right "Book Appointment" → tel:404-333-1611
tasks.description:
Ari Task: Peach Plumbing Button Fix

Site: peachplumbingatlanta.com
Theme: Themeco Pro + Cornerstone Builder (NOT Divi)
Contact: Robert Barnes

What to fix:
The "Book Appointment" button in the upper-right header currently links to /contact-us/ and triggers a JavaScript scheduler widget. David wants it to call 404-333-1611 instead.

Technical details:
- Button is inside Global Block 1245 (Cornerstone)
- Anchor class: x-anchor schedule-btn
- Current href: [Contact Us - Peach Plumbing](https://peachplumbingatlanta.com/contact-us/)
- JavaScript in footer overrides clicks on .schedule-btn to call _scheduler.show()
- Global Block appears 17 times across the site

Steps to fix:
1. Log into WP Admin → Cornerstone → Global Blocks
2. Edit Global Block 1245 (the schedule button block)
3. Change the anchor href from [Contact Us - Peach Plumbing](https://peachplumbingatlanta.com/contact-us/) to tel:404-333-1611
4. Optionally update button text from "Book Appointment" to "Call Now" or "Call 404-333-1611"
5. Save the Global Block — this will update all 17 instances site-wide
6. Remove or disable the JavaScript that intercepts .schedule-btn clicks and calls _scheduler.show() (check header/footer scripts in Cornerstone or Pro theme settings → Custom Scripts)
7. Test on desktop and mobile to confirm the button initiates a phone call

Notes:
- The phone number 404-333-1611 is already used as a tel: link elsewhere on the site
- There are two versions of the scheduler JS (DOMContentLoaded listeners) — both need removing
